name_en: M81520! Lavender! Made of top-grain cowhide! Ladies coin purse card holder. Compact yet extremely practical, this colorful envelope-style coin purse is the perfect companion for the modern woman's urban life. Compact size, easily fits into bags or even pockets. Size: 11×8cm。
